description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a prominent pistol grip and a rail system along the top for mounting accessories. Both front and rear iron sights are present, with the rear sight appearing to be a flip-up type. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The handguard is ventilated for heat dissipation and has attachment points for additional accessories. The overall design is ergonomic and optimized for urban or close-quarters use.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and iron sights, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full rail system.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and additional details of the handguard and stock.
